case.title: IN RE ASSOCIATED GENERAL CONTRACTORS OF CALIFORNIA

opinion.h1: IN RE ASSOCIATED GENERAL CONTRACTORS OF CALIFORNIA, 493 U.S. 928 (1989)
opinion.h2: In re ASSOCIATED GENERAL CONTRACTORS OF CALIFORNIA, INC., et al., No. 89-435.
opinion.p: The petition for a writ of mandamus is dismissed pursuant to Rule 53 of this Court.[ In re ASSOCIATED GENERAL CONTRACTORS OF CALIFORNIA 493 U.S. 928 (1989) ]
